# BaseRep

> Onchain reputation and profile scoring for wallets on the Base network. Connect a Base wallet to receive a 0–1000 reputation score from transactions, holdings, wallet age, and ecosystem participation.

BaseRep analyzes Base mainnet wallet activity and turns it into a verifiable reputation score, achievement badges, and a community leaderboard ranking.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Connect a Base wallet and view your reputation score, activity analytics, badges, and leaderboard ranking.
